series_metadata.series_description: Weekly alcohol and beer permit lists electronically submitted by the Department of Liquor Control and occasionally printed by Department of Taxation.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Destroy 3 yrs after expiration of the calendar year in which the report & any related documentation was received. ; Electronic: Destroy 3 yrs after expiration of the calendar year in which the report & any related documentation was received., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
